title: Psi: Tweaks and Additions
description: This is a Psi add-on. It adds integration with Mekanism.
body:
# Psi: Tweaks and Additions

This mod is a psi add-on.

Main Features
- Disables psi depletion upon taking damage
- Disables psi recovery cooldown
- Adds spells
- Adds CADs
- Adds spell bullets
- Item production via Mekanism
